executives.name: Aaron Jagdfeld
executives.background: Mr. Jagdfeld has served as President and Chief Executive Officer of Generac since September 2008 and as a director since 2006. He joined Generac in 1994 and has served in various roles, including Chief Financial Officer from 2002 to 2007 and President from 2007 to 2008.

executives.name: York Ragen
executives.background: Mr. Ragen has served as Chief Financial Officer since 2008. He joined Generac in 2005 and served as Vice President of Finance and Controller from 2005 to 2008. Prior to joining Generac, he was a director of financial reporting at a large public company.

tenure_dates.title: Vice President of Finance and Controller

executives.name: Kyle Raabe
executives.background: Mr. Raabe has served as Executive Vice President and President of Consumer Power since 2020. He joined Generac in 2007 and has held various leadership roles in sales and marketing.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and President of Consumer Power

executives.name: Steve Willenti
executives.background: Mr. Willenti has served as Executive Vice President and President of Commercial & Industrial since 2022. He joined Generac in 2011 and previously served as Vice President of Engineering.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and President of Commercial & Industrial

executives.name: Tom Pettit
executives.background: Mr. Pettit has served as Chief Operations Officer since 2020. Prior to joining Generac, he held senior leadership roles at several global manufacturing companies.

board_of_directors.name: Aaron Jagdfeld
board_of_directors.background: President and Chief Executive Officer of Generac Holdings Inc. since 2008.

board_of_directors.name: Robert Dixon
board_of_directors.background: Former CEO of Realogy Holdings Corp. and former executive at PepsiCo.

board_of_directors.name: David Dooley
board_of_directors.background: Former President of Savant Systems and former executive at Whirlpool Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Marcia Avedon
board_of_directors.background: Former Chief HR Officer at Trane Technologies and former executive at Honeywell.

board_of_directors.name: Dominic Caruso
board_of_directors.background: Former Chief Financial Officer of Johnson & Johnson.

board_of_directors.name: Nam Nguyen
board_of_directors.background: Former Chief Operating Officer of SunPower Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Kathryn Roedel
board_of_directors.background: Former Executive Vice President of Sleep Number Corporation.
